tracks.title: 🇲🇳 Eternal Steppe | Мөнхийн Тал — Mongolian Throat Singing Khoomei 2026 | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
Journey to the endless Mongolian steppe through the ancient art of Khoomei throat singing. 🇲🇳

Монгол хөөмий — UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage since 2009.

Мөнхийн тал нутагт хөөмийн ая дуурсана.
(On the eternal steppe, the melody of khoomei resonates.)

Featuring morin khuur (horse-head fiddle), overtone harmonics, and the vast soundscape of nomadic Mongolia. A single voice produces multiple notes simultaneously — one of the most extraordinary vocal techniques in human history.

⏱️ Chapters:
00:00 — Dawn on the steppe
01:30 — Khoomei harmonics
03:00 — Horse fiddle melody
04:00 — Eternal horizon

🎧 Perfect for: world music discovery, meditation, cultural exploration, ambient listening
